description: Add collision geometry (boundingObject) and physics properties (Physics nodes) to a table and three tabletop objects so they interact physically in the Webots simulation. Configure the TABLE Solid node with a Box boundingObject (0.8 x 0.6 x 0.05) and no Physics node. Configure the RED_BOX Solid node with a Box boundingObject (0.1 x 0.1 x 0.1) and a Physics node with a mass of 0.5 kg. Configure the BLUE_SPHERE Solid node with a Sphere boundingObject (radius 0.05) and a Physics node with a mass of 0.3 kg. Configure the GREEN_CYLINDER Solid node with a Cylinder boundingObject (height 0.12, radius 0.04) and a Physics node with a mass of 0.4 kg. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/physics_configured.wbt.
